name: quikquiz
description: AI-powered quiz generator for teachers and trainers

scripts.dev: concurrently "node server/index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm install && cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try { require('fs').mkdirSync(require('path').join(__dirname, 'data'), {recursive: true}); require('fs').writeFileSync(require('path').join(__dirname, 'data', 'usage.json'), '{}', 'utf-8'); } catch(e) { console.error('Failed to create data directory:', e.message); }"
